---
title: "Arabella Lucy Scarlett"
---

## Arabella Lucy Scarlett

**Dates:** (b.1857)

**Maiden name:** (Walsh)

### Description

wife of Major[[person:1285] Robert Scarlett] of Otterbourne House

### Letters

- Letter from April 4th 1900[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
